product_brief: Pure Rust implementation of the Module-Lattice-Based Key-Encapsulation Mechanism Standard (ML-KEM) as described in FIPS 203.
pqc_support: Yes (Implements ML-KEM, formerly Kyber, a NIST-standardized post-quantum KEM)
pqc_capability_description: Implements the Module-Lattice-Based Key-Encapsulation Mechanism (ML-KEM) standardized by NIST in FIPS 203. Supports three security levels: MlKem512 (128-bit), MlKem768 (192-bit), and MlKem1024 (256-bit). The implementation is a pure Rust library for key encapsulation, not yet independently audited.
license: Apache License, Version 2.0 OR MIT license
fips_validated: No (Implements algorithm described in FIPS 203, but implementation is not stated as validated)
signature_schemes: Not stated (Product implements Key Encapsulation Mechanisms, not signature schemes)

product_brief: Pure Rust implementation of the Module-Lattice-Based Digital Signature Standard (ML-DSA) as described in FIPS 204.
pqc_capability_description: Implements ML-DSA (formerly CRYSTALS-Dilithium) per FIPS 204 final. Supports parameter sets MlDsa44 (Category 2), MlDsa65 (Category 3), and MlDsa87 (Category 5). Implementation is pure Rust, supports `no_std`, but has never been independently audited.
crypto_primitives: ML-DSA (MlDsa44, MlDsa65, MlDsa87), DSA, ECDSA, Ed25519, Ed448, LMS, SLH-DSA, XMSS
fips_validated: No (Implementation described in FIPS 204 final, but not stated as validated)
signature_schemes: ML-DSA (MlDsa44, MlDsa65, MlDsa87), DSA, ECDSA, Ed25519, Ed448, LMS, SLH-DSA, XMSS

product_brief: Pure Rust implementation of the SLH-DSA (SPHINCS+) signature scheme based on FIPS-205.
pqc_capability_description: Implements Stateless Hash-based Digital Signature Algorithm (SLH-DSA) based on SPHINCS+, finalized in NIST FIPS-205. Supports 12 parameter sets using SHA2 and SHAKE256 hash functions. Signatures range from 7KB to 50KB. Implementation is not independently audited.
crypto_primitives: SLH-DSA (SPHINCS+), SHA2, SHAKE256, Ed25519, ECDSA, DSA, LMS, ML-DSA, XMSS
fips_validated: No (Implementation based on FIPS-205 standard, but not stated as validated)
signature_schemes: SLH-DSA (SPHINCS+), DSA, ECDSA, Ed25519, Ed448, LMS, ML-DSA, XMSS
